'''Bay One''' was the name of the main [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bay]] located onboard the modified [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyer]] [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']]. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] crash-landed in Bay One during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], in their attempt to rescue [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. It was filled with [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] and [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]].
